title: campomanesia obversa
intro: Campomanesia obversa, also known as the Brazilian guava, is a plant species belonging to the family Myrtaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campomanesia obversa include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal benefits, or used in the form of a decoction, which involves boiling the plant material in water to release its active compounds.
